upstream.reference: official release tag v0.80.9 at 2d16f92973230a7e095aa984f150ba8702784f50; release-only audit from prior pinned 2be9efa19cd64aed40ca63f92c0c0f9a6bac7c9d; generated registries exported from packages/ai at tag v0.80.9

pluggableTransports.reason: AWS SigV4/event-stream transport is platform/dependency heavy and is intentionally supplied by consumers.
WebSocket/session-cache transport is pluggable; SSE fallback is bundled.

validation.latestStaticCheck: make static-check passed in this container for v0.80.9 parity changes

knownNonBundledCapabilities: Radius browser callback server/UI automation is platform-disposed; Swift implements OAuth discovery, PKCE prompt flow, device-code/token refresh, /v1/config credential caching, model injection, PI_GATEWAY_API_KEY/API key, and pi-messages wire protocol
Vendor SDK-native retry stacks where a vendor SDK is not bundled

transportTestRequirements.CodexTransport: Must use a real RFC6455 WebSocket client/handshake and include local WS-server integration tests for handshake, streaming, and connection-limit retry/fallback behavior.
